creator: albert.shih@obspm.fr
text:
Created attachment 236949
Patch for Makefile

Hi, 

The RT::CommandbyEmail extension to RT supports RT 5.0 , but the port only supports RT 4.4.  This patch adds FLAVORs for rt44 and rt50, in much the same way as www/p5-RT-Extension-MandatoryOnTransition does.

Regards
